# Anvesh Seeli

> Performance marketing leader at Mars Pet Nutrition (Pedigree, Whiskas, Sheba). Ex-Domino's Pizza India. IIM Calcutta MBA. Specialist in incrementality-first marketing, social commerce, and multi-crore growth systems.
